feed.title: SAP Community - SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central
feed.subtitle: SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Auto-delegate Added as Section in Legacy People profile
entry.content:
Hi All,

We created AutoDelegate as Section in Legacy People profile so all Action Employee has to take can be from his profile. To enable better experience.

Now post New people profile Migration there are user UI which are not supported anymore. Did anyone face this any ETA on the fix.

Not Supported in new people profile.

entry.title: Question About Certification Requirement for Access to EC Provisioning
entry.content:
Hi all,
I would like to ask one question regarding SAP SuccessFactors certifications.
If a person obtains the following certification, would they be eligible to access the EC implementation Provisioning environment?

SAP Certified - SAP SuccessFactors Platform: Reporting (C_THR92)

We are currently considering the priority order of certifications for our internal team members, so I would appreciate it if you could kindly confirm this when you have a chance.

Thank you in advance for your support.

entry.title: SuccessFactors - Latest People Profile Page
entry.content:
Hi

We are in the middle of configuring the Latest People Profile Page, and was wondering what affect moving cards into different categories, affects reporting and any integrations we have set up?

For example, we had 'absence' which sat in our 'profile' area now moved to the 'Time Information' category.  Does reporting stil show this as sitting under profile or will it show in 'time' and we need to reconfigure all of our reporting/integrations?  Or is the latest people profile page, just a 'display/cover' and has no effect on existing reports/integrations?

Thanks

entry.title: changes to company org chart and sync with jobinfo
entry.content:
Hello,

Please is there a way to synchronize between updates from company org chart to employee jobinfo. For example Department 1 is no longer associated to Division 1, it's instead associated with division 2. will the employees assigned to Department 1 have their Division automatically updated in their profiles?

entry.title: EC Global Assignment and LMS Users (multiple users) - how are you using this ?
entry.content:
Hi,

We have been using LMS for 8 years, and are about to deploy EC.

The concept of "Employee Central Global Assignment / Concurrent Employment in LMS", i really don't see any added value for having multiple users (Home and Host) in the LMS.

Has anyone built an alternative way of managing this ?

Two reasons why I don't like this:

a) our staff need to complete loads of pre-requisite Compliance courses before doing any work. If they are using a concurrent or host user, then the system would not recognize prior learning completions. We could manually use Merge users, but this is not really convincing. Finally, this means doing merge back once a host acc

b) Learning should be focussed on the Person, not on the contact. 

I just read in a SAP article that SAP may be considering implementing a People-Centric view. That would make so much sense.

If you work with the standard multiple users, are you satisfied with this?

Thanks,

 

Kristian

entry.title: Usernames created as old-username@domain-n (where n is increment from 1)
entry.content:
I know this is standard procedure for SAP SuccessFactors (https://userapps.support.sap.com/sap/support/knowledge/en/2835790) - but we see that we have several seasonal workers in different employments during the years and som har domain-4 or -5 as username. This gives us the following headaches: 
1. We sync usernames to external non-SAP payroll. This fails, as username in payroll needs to be a valid email address

2. We do also write username from Entra ID / Azure AD to SuccessFactors, and we are well stocked with errors now, as "username already exists". For Entra ID see the user as the same user, but in SuccessFactors the user may be on his 4th employment - where the 1st employment (now inactive) is user@domain.com, 2nd employent (inactive) is user@domain.com-1, 3rd employment (inactive) is user@domain.com-2 and the active is user@domain.com-3  

Is there a good way to automatically switch usernames so the last active can be without the number-increment? Or do anyone have any other good calls for this?

Thank you !

entry.title: Export Manage Permission Roles detail view
entry.content:
I've seen similar questions being raised, and this far it seems to be an ongoing limitation in SuccessFactors. There seems to be no report & no report domain available that will allow admins to extract a report that will give the granular level of detail you find in Manage Permission Roles --> View role for....

Down to field level and the type of access (view, edit etc.)

This is a constant audit requirement and there appears to be nothing available to allow admins to extract this granular level of information. The available domains described in KBA 2089542 (Different types of RBP reports available in Table Report) does not meet this requirement.

The only way available seems to download the permissions from 'Manage Permission Roles --> View role for....', extract to Excel and manipulate the data from there?

entry.title: Data Replication Proxy - Time Off
entry.content:
We have Data Replication Proxy set up to replicate absences. We recently added a new absence but forgot to add it to the Data Replication Configuration list of time types. We have now added it, but need to generate the proxies for the absences that were created before the Data Replication Configuration was updated.

In the Data Replication Configuration, there is a field for Execute Data Replication Proxy job. However, the documentation says that if it is set to Yes, it will create proxies for all relevant absences, even if they have already been created. This does not sound like what we want.

The alternatives suggested in documentation are to use Trigger Data Replication Proxy Creation Job, but I only see an option to do that by user, not by the time type. The other suggested alternative is to make a change to each Time Off/Absence record, which could be rather time consuming. 

Another alternative that I am wondering about is creating a new Data Replication Configuration record with only the new absence type, set the Execute Proxy Creation to Yes, and then delete this new record and let the existing Data Replication Config record pick up any newly created absences going forward.

Does anyone else have a suggestion on how this can be handled? 

Thank you,

Cindy

entry.title: Send user login data from SuccessFactors to SAC
entry.content:
Hi,

We need to send user login data from SuccessFactors to SAC that stipulates the last time a user logged in on SuccessFactors.

When checking the OData API Data Dictionary, we only find a field "lastLoginFailedDateTime". We cannot find one for the last login time.

Where can we get these data sets via the OData API?

Thanks

entry.title: Absence counting config : Deduction quantity should include holidays on working days, not on weekoff
entry.content:
HI , 

This global client is only using absence module of Successfactors.

We have seen this common req. where they want deduction quantity to consider working days and holidays falling on working days. 

26th Mar - Working

27th Mar - Holiday + Working day

28thth Mar - Holiday + Non working day

29th Mar - Holiday + Non working day

29th Mar - Working day 

Leave applied from 26th to 29th Mar then it should  be 3 days . 

We tried using absence counting config. with holidays included as YES . 

But it reads 5 days then. 

If we use planned working time >=0 then as well the system takes it 0 for holiday falling on working day. 

We cant use weekdays - as they have dynamic workschedules with M-F working or THURSDAY to WED working. 

In absence counting rule as well we tried adding condition but could see any parameter that reads working days. 

Hence, as work around we are using PERIOD WORK SCHEDULE such that for days that have scheduled time we are marking them as SHIFT CLASSIFICATION as WORKING and excluding non working . 

That way in absence counting rule we are able to filter the condition if SHIFT = WORKING AND HOLIDAY = FULL then set deduction quantity = 1.

Please let us know if anyone has come across scenario through standard approach and how they achieved it. 

SAP SuccessFactors Time Tracking

entry.title: ECP contract generation from IT0016 + SuccessFactors DocuSign integration
entry.content:
Hi all,

Has anyone implemented a process where the labor contract is generated in ECP (based on IT0016) and then sent for signature through DocuSign using the standard SAP SuccessFactors – DocuSign integration?

The idea would be for SuccessFactors to send the document directly for signature, without using Integration Suite / middleware between IT0016 and DocuSign.

In other words, we are wondering if this could be handled more or less as a standard SuccessFactors document template with the "signature" option enabled = true, even if the contract-related data originates from ECP / IT0016.

Or, from your experience, would it be more recommended to generate the labor contract directly in SuccessFactors instead?

Thanks!

entry.title: Maximum Number of Employment Records for Each Person - 1H 2026 Product Release Update
entry.content:
Regarding the change "Maximum Number of Employment Records for Each Person" (ECT-258899), what is the approach for handling employees who already exceed this limit? This is a problem our customers will face in Production. Please confirm, is this across all assignments, regardless of whether they are active or inactive?

We have customers with very specific scenarios where this is common practice and necessary to meet the business requirements. This will cause issues once this is deployed.

@ChrisPaine FYI.

Angela.

entry.title: EC -> EP -> LMS user data in Intergration Center without "(ID)"
entry.content:
Hi,

We've been on BizX and LMS (without EC) for 8 years. We are about to deploy EC. Now the interface EC to EP, includes the IDs in parenthesis by default. Eg Department was "Sales North" becomes "Sales North (001013)".

We have a over 700 active Assignment profiles in the LMS with rules based on user data that is now changing to include the ID. And there is no way to mass-updated the values in the LMS APMs.

There is a document from SAP on this topic, stating there is a way to find columns without the ID in the Integration Center. At this point we are still searching...

I found I can use the "split text" function in calculated field, but I am not sure this is a safe way.

Has anyone else been through this ?

Any advise or suggestion?

Thanks.

Kris

entry.title: 1H 2026 Product Release - EC - Latest People Profile - New Edit & History UI
entry.content:
We have observed that the latest People Profile introduces stricter rules and validation compared to the previous version. Since adopting the new Edit & History UI, our company is encountering a critical issue that directly impacts daily operations.

Issue description

  • When editing an employee record in the new Edit & History UI (for example, updating the Cost Center),
  • Other mandatory fields unexpectedly become empty.
  • When those empty fields are reselected or corrected, additional fields become empty again.
  • This cycle makes it extremely difficult and error-prone to save valid changes.

Impact

  • The issue significantly blocks administrative maintenance of Employee Central data.
  • We cannot simplify or relax our business rules or object definitions, as they are essential for system integrity and downstream processes.

Question

  • Is SAP aware of this behavior in the new Edit & History UI?
  • Will SAP investigate this issue and provide a fix or guidance on how this should be handled?

SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central - Employee Profile

entry.title: Improvement Request: Ability for Admins to Permanently Delete Stalled Workflows in Employee Central
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

I’m looking for input from other SuccessFactors customers regarding a workflow management challenge in Employee Central.

🔍The Challenge

When a workflow becomes stuck in a pending or stalled status, administrators currently have no standard way to remove it. Although approvers can decline workflows, there is no central administrative function that allows specific workflow IDs to be permanently deleted.

Over time, these stalled workflows accumulate, creating clutter, confusion, and unnecessary administrative effort for employees, managers, HRBPs, and administrators.

💡Suggested Enhancement

We’ve submitted an SAP Influence idea proposing the introduction of a feature that would allow administrators to:

  • Permanently delete stalled or obsolete workflows, and
  • Control access to this capability via Role-Based Permissions (RBP)

This would provide a secure and efficient way to keep workflow data clean and manageable.

🌍Why This Matters

Many organizations would benefit from this enhancement. Key advantages include:

  • Stronger data governance
  • Cleaner and more manageable workflow queues
  • Reduced inbox clutter
  • Improved administrative efficiency
  • Enhanced audit and compliance control
  • Better overall system performance
  • A smoother user experience for all roles

If your organization faces similar challenges, I’d really appreciate your support.
You can view and vote for the idea here:
👉 Improvement Request Details - Customer Influence

I’d also be interested to hear how others are handling stalled workflows today.

Your feedback and support mean a lot.

Alina

entry.title: Recalculation of holiday quotas after removal of fixed term
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

When an employee’s fixed-term contract is converted to a permanent one, the recalculation of their holiday entitlement should be triggered automatically and the updated figures should be recorded in the Time Account.

We have already tried this using a rule and via an Integration Centre job. Unfortunately, neither method triggered the recalculation. The end date of the fixed-term contract is included in the job information.

Has anyone else implemented this before?

Thanks in advance 🙂

entry.title: Three dots in Performance Management Form
entry.content:
Hello,

is there a way to modify the icon with the 3 dots in the PMP? example, rename it; instead of having 3 dots, name it Edit or modify?

Thank you,

Diana

entry.title: Hi, What is the best way for security reports for auditing purpose?
entry.content:
Since role are tied to Positions and If employee is transferred to position which is tied to a Admin security role and we need to create report to capture such scenario so we can work with business as audit the roles and access.

 

Thanks!

entry.title: SAP SuccessFactors Certification
entry.content:
Dear Community,

I have started learning SAP EC and would like to what are my options to get certified?

Previously, there used to be an option where we can individually register for a certification for a fee and have 6 months to complete a certification. But now, I am not able to view that option anymore.

My company doesn't use SAP, so I cannot subscribe as a Customer / Partner and I am not a student.

Could someone please let me know what is my option to get certified as an individual?

Thank you,

Sree

#certification SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central

entry.title: People Seach - New UI
entry.content: Hello, I am trying to see if the new People Profile UI can have the same capability of current environment to be able to highlighting someone's name on their profile and being able to automatically see their organization and hitting if they are active or inactive. Has anyone figured this out? Please let me know.
